meaning_english: High / Top / Extremity. Example: Acrophobia (fear of heights), Acronym (word formed from top/first letters).
Male / Man. Example: Android (resembling a man), Misandry (hatred of men).
Blame / Fault. Example: Culpable (deserving blame), Exculpate (free from blame).
People. Example: Democracy (rule by people), Epidemic (spread among people).
Power / Energy. Example: Dynamic (full of energy), Dynamite (powerful explosive).
Stray / Mistake. Example: Error (mistake), Erratic (not regular/straying).
Faith / Trust. Example: Fidelity (faithfulness), Confide (trust with a secret).
Pleasing / Thankful. Example: Gratitude (thankfulness), Gratuitous (given free/uncalled for).
Flock / Herd / Group. Example: Gregarious (sociable/likes groups), Segregate (separate from the group).
Sun. Example: Heliotherapy (sun cure), Helioscope (instrument to look at sun).
Inflammation / Swelling. Example: Arthritis (joint swelling), Gastritis (stomach inflammation).
Language / Tongue. Example: Bilingual (two languages), Linguistics (study of language).
Speak / Talk. Example: Loquacious (very talkative), Eloquent (fluent speaker).
Form / Shape. Example: Amorphous (shapeless), Metamorphosis (change of form).
All / Every. Example: Omnipresent (present everywhere), Omnivorous (eats everything).
Feeling / Suffering / Disease. Example: Empathy (sharing feelings), Pathology (study of disease).
Love / Friend. Example: Bibliophile (book lover), Philosophy (love of wisdom).
Sound. Example: Cacophony (harsh sound), Phonetics (study of speech sounds).
To Please / Calm. Example: Placate (make less angry), Placid (calm/peaceful).
Fight / Fist. Example: Pugnacious (ready to fight), Impugn (attack as false).
Know / Knowledge. Example: Science (systematic knowledge), Omniscient (all-knowing).
Sleep. Example: Insomnia (unable to sleep), Somnambulist (sleepwalker).
Wise / Wisdom. Example: Sophisticated (complex/wise), Sophistry (clever but false reasoning).
God. Example: Theology (study of God), Monotheism (belief in one God).
True / Truth. Example: Verity (truth), Verdict (true saying/judgment).
Live / Life. Example: Vivacious (lively), Vitality (energy/life).
Foreigner / Stranger. Example: Xenophobia (fear of foreigners), Xenogamy (cross-fertilization).
Animal. Example: Zoology (study of animals), Zodiac (circle of animal signs).
Self. Example: Autocrat (absolute ruler), Autonomous (self-governing).
Step / Go. Example: Aggressive (stepping toward/hostile), Digress (step away).
